finding: ARCHITECTURE NOTE - Dual Defense Layer Design: Two complementary safety mechanisms needed alongside epistemic middleware: (1) NOETIC FILTER - Defense at cognition/thought level. Filters at the point of knowledge formation and reasoning. Detects cognitive distortions, hallucination patterns, overconfidence in claims, epistemic boundary violations. Works on the 'thinking' pathway. (2) AXIOLOGIC DETECTION LAYER - Defense at action/value level. Filters at the point of tool invocation and side effects. Detects harmful actions, policy violations, resource abuse, unauthorized operations. Works on the 'doing' pathway. Together: Noesis defense (what AI thinks/believes) + Action defense (what AI does/executes) = Complete epistemic safety envelope.

finding: ARCHITECTURE NOTE: Metacognitive Signaling & Biological Dashboard Implementation. CURRENT PROBLEM: Existing metacognitive signaling plugin uses keyword/prompt detection + heuristics for drift detection, which defeats the purpose of Empirica's genuine self-assessment system. Must implement proper vector-based monitoring per epistemic_tracking.md API. REQUIRED IMPLEMENTATION: (1) TRAFFIC LIGHT SYSTEM: Map 0.0-1.0 vectors to fuzzy labels (Crystalline/Solid/Emergent/Flicker/Void) with colors (Blue/Green/Yellow/Red/Gray), (2) BIG THREE DISPLAY: KNOW (memory/factuality), SIGNAL (relevance), UNCERTAINTY (liar meter - inverted), (3) DENSITY WARNING: Trigger branch/fork when cognitive load critical, (4) SENTINEL GATES: HALT (blind confidence trap: KNOW high + SIGNAL low), BRANCH (density critical), REVISE (consistency fail), LOCK (uncertainty high + impact high). VISUAL FORMAT: Moon phases for density bars + emoji status indicators. Reference: docs/reference/api/epistemic_tracking.md for genuine tracking API.
